title: Tooth Decay: MedlinePlus
text:
ake sure that your children get sealants on their teeth. Dental sealants are thin plastic coatings that protect the chewing surfaces of the back teeth. Children should get sealants on their back teeth as soon as they come in, before decay can attack the teeth. 
NIH: National Institute of Dental and Craniofacial Research
